query: 帮我汇总上周的邮件和本周的日程，生成一份晨报。

Build a recurring weekly digest of my Gmail unread and upcoming events.
上周哪些邮件可能还没回？结合这周日程给我个关注清单。
Produce a markdown weekly digest file and a short chat summary from my mail and calendar.
把晨报做成定时任务，周一早上跑。
Which senders dominated my inbox last week, and what meetings do I have this week?
给我一份上周邮件概况：总量、未读占比、Top 发件人。
Set up the digest so it staggers around my other Monday automations.
帮我给某人写一封回复邮件。
Delete all unread newsletters from my inbox.
查一下我 Outlook 邮箱的未读邮件。
Create a calendar event with the client on Friday.
Write a Shopify Liquid section for the hero banner.
Summarize this PDF report into five bullet points.
